_metadata.description: Simulated enterprise change-management evidence for Q1 2026 audit. All data is fabricated.

fields.summary: Enhance customer statement export API (PDF + CSV)
fields.description: Add multi-format (PDF/CSV) statement export endpoint for retail banking customers.
fields.customfield_10210: Revert deployment via pipeline rollback job. DB migration has down-script validated in test env on 2026-02-09.

fields.summary: [EMERGENCY] Payments DB connection pool exhaustion hotfix
fields.description: P1 incident INC-88821: connection pool exhaustion causing 500s on /v2/payments. Hotfix raises pool size and adds eviction policy.
fields.customfield_10210: Rollback to previous artifact via pipeline. Connection pool config is feature-flagged; toggle off if needed.

fields.description: P1 incident INC-88935: auth-service pods OOM-killed every ~6h. Patch addresses JWT cache leak.
fields.customfield_10210: Revert Deployment resource via kubectl rollout undo. Previous image tag pinned.

fields.summary: Update login page copy and terms link
fields.description: Marketing-requested copy change on /login page plus updated link to latest T&C.
fields.customfield_10210: Revert via feature-flag toggle. Static content only.

fields.summary: Payment gateway SDK upgrade to v4.2.1
fields.description: Upgrade to v4.2.1 to pick up PCI DSS 4.0 tokenization changes and critical CVE-2026-14421 fix.
fields.customfield_10210: Downgrade SDK version via artifact pinning; rollback playbook validated in test.

fields.description: Rewrite internal reporting service in Java for long-term supportability; behind internal network only.
fields.customfield_10210: Blue-green switchover; keep old Go service warm for 72h. Rollback = repoint load balancer.

fields.description: Enable 50/50 A/B test of seasonal promotional banner on landing page. Low-risk UI change.
fields.customfield_10210: Feature flag controlled; disable flag to revert.

fields.description: Bug fix release: biometric login retries, Arabic localisation strings. Submitted to App Store after sign-off.
In-place upgrade of prod EKS cluster from 1.28 to 1.30. Follows successful dev/test upgrades in prior weeks.
fields.customfield_10210: Rollback plan: restore etcd snapshot taken pre-upgrade; pin nodes to previous AMI; redeploy workloads via ArgoCD.

fields.summary: Core banking ledger schema migration (add multi-currency fields)
fields.description: Extend ledger schema with currency_iso and fx_rate_ref columns. Reviewed by CAB in three sessions (2026-03-05, 2026-03-12, 2026-03-19). Architecture sign-off and risk committee approval attached.
fields.customfield_10210: Dual-write mode for 48h; flag-controlled reader switch; full DB snapshot pre-migration; down-migration script validated in UAT.

pull_requests.title: chore: update login copy + T&C link
feat: initial java port of reporting service
feat: add multi-currency columns to ledger schema

freeze_windows.label: Q1 2026 quarter-end freeze
freeze_windows.reason: Quarter-end financial close & regulatory reporting (RBI quarterly return)

freeze_windows.label: Feb 2026 RBI monthly return window
freeze_windows.reason: RBI monthly return submission (no prod changes to data plane)

exceptions.justification: P1 incident INC-88821 — production outage; deploy outside RBI freeze approved by CTO.
Pre-approved critical ledger migration — must complete before Q2. Risk committee approved 2026-03-19.

1) Revert to previous k8s image tag · 2) Disable pool-eviction feature flag
